recipe.title: Easy flatbreads
recipe.description: A brilliant easy flatbread recipe for cooking with kids – get them to roll their sleeves up and get stuck in, and they'll learn how to make flatbreads.

ingredients.name: fresh soft herbs
ingredients.note: such as flat-leaf parsley, tarragon, basil, dill

steps.descr: Add all the flatbread ingredients to a mixing bowl and...
steps.instructions: Add all the flatbread ingredients to a mixing bowl and mix together with a spoon, then use clean hands to pat and bring everything together.

on_enter.say: Add all the flatbread ingredients to a mixing bowl and mix together with a spoon, then use clean hands to pat and bring everything together.

steps.descr: Dust a clean work surface with flour, then tip out the dough
steps.instructions: Dust a clean work surface with flour, then tip out the dough.

on_enter.say: Dust a clean work surface with flour, then tip out the dough.

steps.descr: Knead for a minute or so to bring it all together (this...
steps.instructions: Knead for a minute or so to bring it all together (this isn’t a traditional bread recipe, so you don’t need to knead it for long – just enough time to bring everything together).

on_enter.say: Knead for a minute or so to bring it all together (this isn’t a traditional bread recipe, so you don’t need to knead it for long – just enough time to bring everything together).

steps.descr: Put the dough into a floured-dusted bowl and cover with...
steps.instructions: Put the dough into a floured-dusted bowl and cover with a plate, then leave aside.

on_enter.say: Put the dough into a floured-dusted bowl and cover with a plate, then leave aside.

steps.descr: If making the garlic butter: peel the garlic cloves and...
steps.instructions: If making the garlic butter: peel the garlic cloves and crush them with a garlic crusher.

on_enter.say: If making the garlic butter: peel the garlic cloves and crush them with a garlic crusher.

steps.descr: Pick the herb leaves onto a chopping board and finely...
steps.instructions: Pick the herb leaves onto a chopping board and finely chop them, discarding the stalks.

on_enter.say: Pick the herb leaves onto a chopping board and finely chop them, discarding the stalks.

steps.descr: Melt the butter in a small pan over a medium heat, then...
steps.instructions: Melt the butter in a small pan over a medium heat, then stir through the garlic and chopped herbs, then set aside.

on_enter.say: Melt the butter in a small pan over a medium heat, then stir through the garlic and chopped herbs, then set aside.

steps.descr: Dust a clean work surface and rolling pin with flour,...
steps.instructions: Dust a clean work surface and rolling pin with flour, then divide the dough in half, then divide each half into 6 equal-sized pieces (roughly the size of a golf ball).

on_enter.say: Dust a clean work surface and rolling pin with flour, then divide the dough in half, then divide each half into 6 equal-sized pieces (roughly the size of a golf ball).

steps.descr: With your hands, pat and flatten the dough, then use a...
steps.instructions: With your hands, pat and flatten the dough, then use a rolling pin to roll each piece into 12cm rounds, roughly 2mm to 3mm thick.

on_enter.say: With your hands, pat and flatten the dough, then use a rolling pin to roll each piece into 12cm rounds, roughly 2mm to 3mm thick.

steps.descr: Use a knife to cut 6 lines into the centre of each...
steps.instructions: Use a knife to cut 6 lines into the centre of each round, leaving about 3cm at each end.

on_enter.say: Use a knife to cut 6 lines into the centre of each round, leaving about 3cm at each end.

steps.descr: Place the griddle pan on a high heat, then once hot,...
steps.instructions: Place the griddle pan on a high heat, then once hot, cook each one for 1 to 2 minutes on each side, or until bar-marked and puffed up, turning with tongs.

on_enter.say: Place the griddle pan on a high heat, then once hot, cook each one for 1 to 2 minutes on each side, or until bar-marked and puffed up, turning with tongs.

steps.descr: Brush the flatbreads all over with herby garlic butter...
steps.instructions: Brush the flatbreads all over with herby garlic butter as they come off the griddle, then pile onto a serving board so everyone can dig in and help themselves.

on_enter.say: Brush the flatbreads all over with herby garlic butter as they come off the griddle, then pile onto a serving board so everyone can dig in and help themselves.
